name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram is a global money transfer service with 48+ locations across Memphis, TN, operating through partner retailers like CVS, Walmart, and Ace Cash Express for convenient cash transfers.
description_long:
MoneyGram is an established money transfer company that operates through a network of third-party retail locations rather than standalone branches. The company has built its presence in Memphis by partnering with convenience stores, supermarkets, and check-cashing outlets to provide accessible financial services to underbanked consumers. This distribution model allows MoneyGram to maintain a wide footprint without owning physical locations.

MoneyGram's core service is domestic and international money transfer, allowing customers to send and receive funds both online and in person at partner locations. Customers can search for nearby locations by address, city, state, or ZIP code through an interactive map interface. The service operates at extended hours through partners—many locations stay open until 8-11 PM—making transfers accessible outside traditional banking hours. In Memphis specifically, MoneyGram operates through major partners including CVS, Walmart, Ace Cash Express, Cash Express, and La Fiesta Supermarket.

What distinguishes MoneyGram is its omnichannel approach, allowing customers to initiate transfers online and pick up cash at physical locations, or conduct transactions entirely in person. The company's reliance on established retail partners (particularly Walmart and major pharmacy chains) provides brand recognition and trust. With 48 documented locations in Memphis alone, the network density ensures most residents have access within reasonable distance. The extended operating hours through retail partners address a key need for working consumers who cannot visit traditional banks during business hours.

MoneyGram's service model carries inherent limitations: transaction fees are typically higher than bank wire transfers, making it more expensive for regular users. The dependence on partner locations means service quality and hours vary by retailer. While convenient for occasional transfers, the cost structure makes it less suitable for frequent international remittance needs compared to specialized digital transfer services. The website provides location and basic service information but lacks pricing transparency and detailed fee structures upfront.
pros: 48+ locations across Memphis providing widespread geographic coverage for convenient access
Extended operating hours (many locations open until 8-11 PM) through retail partners like CVS and Walmart
Omnichannel capability: initiate transfers online and pick up in-person, or conduct full transactions at locations
Partnerships with trusted major retailers (Walmart, CVS) and established check-cashing operators (Ace Cash Express)
Interactive map-based location finder with search by address, city, state, or ZIP code
Ability to send and receive money both online and offline without requiring a bank account
Operations at supermarkets and grocery stores (La Fiesta) adding convenience to routine shopping trips
cons: No pricing information displayed on website; customers must call or visit locations to learn fee amounts
Service quality and hours depend on individual partner retailers, creating inconsistent customer experience
Higher transaction costs compared to bank wire transfers and modern digital remittance services
Limited to partner location availability; cannot access service at all hours or all neighborhoods equally
Requires physical location visit for cash pickup, reducing convenience versus fully digital solutions
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers without access to traditional bank wire services
Customers needing to send/receive money outside of standard 9-5 banking hours
People without smartphones or internet access who prefer in-person transaction options
Occasional domestic money transfer users seeking convenience over lowest cost
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers and occasional money transfer users who prioritize location convenience and extended hours over competitive pricing. The primary caveat is that this is a premium-priced service suitable for infrequent transfers; regular international remittance senders would benefit from lower-cost digital alternatives, and the lack of upfront pricing transparency requires customers to contact locations directly for fee information.
services: Domestic money transfers to other MoneyGram locations
Online money transfer initiation with in-person pickup
In-person money send and receive at retail partner locations
Money transfer through CVS pharmacy locations
Money transfer through Ace Cash Express check-cashing outlets
Money transfer through La Fiesta supermarket locations
Location search and store hours information
